conditionA_COVEVague.name: Receive Delivered Box
conditionA_COVEVague.summary: The Receiving Agent accepts a delivered box, validates its identity, records its arrival, unpacks it, and transfers bags to the Registration Operator.

steps.description: Delivers a box to the Receiving Agent.
Accepts the delivered box.
Validates the identity of the box.
Records the box and bag arrival into the Nighttime Receiving Registry Software.
Unpacks the box.
Places bags onto a cart.
Moves the cart with bags to the Registration Operator.
The bags are ready for subsequent processing by the Registration Operator.
Signs a paper delivery form.

conditionB_COVEDetailed.name: MO1. Register arrival of a box
conditionB_COVEDetailed.summary: The Receiving Agent (RA) receives a box from a Transport Company, validates its ID, registers its arrival and contents into the system, and then moves the contents to the Registration Operator (RO).

steps.description: Receives and opens box (box ID, bags with bag IDs) from TransportCompany TC.
Validates box ID with TC registered IDs.
May sign a paper form for the delivery person.

Registers arrival and contents into the 'Nightime Receiving Registry Software' system, providing RA ID, date, time, box ID, Transport Company. It also provides the person's name (if delivery person's), bag IDs (if available) or total count of bags, and estimated value (if available).
Removes bags from the box, puts them onto a cart, and takes them to the Registration Operator.
The RA performs actions to address the ID mismatch, such as contacting a supervisor or the transport company.
Ceases current work and follows emergency procedures.
Registration is interrupted.
Registration is interrupted due to system unavailability.

groundTruth.name: Register Arrival of a Box
groundTruth.summary: Receiving Agent receives a box from a transport company, validates it, registers the arrival in the system, and prepares it for the Registration Operator.
preconditions: Transport company has delivered the box
Nighttime Receiving Registry Software is operational
postconditions: Box arrival is registered in the system
Bags are prepared on cart for Registration Operator

steps.description: Receives and opens box (box id, bags with bag ids) from TransportCompany
Validates box id with TC registered ids
Signs paper form for delivery person (optional)
Registers arrival into system with: RA id, date, time, box id, TransportCompany, person name, number of bags with bag ids, estimated value
Removes bags from box, puts onto cart, and takes to Registration Operator

flows.condition: Box id does not match transport company registered ids

steps.description: Rejects the box and notifies transport company of mismatch

flows.condition: Fire alarm goes off and interrupts registration

steps.description: Stops registration process and follows fire safety procedures
Leaves the box and contents on the desk and waits for computer to come back up
